title: Under the Tonto Rim
writer: Zane Grey, Alfred Hustwick, J. Walter Ruben
actors: Richard Arlen, Mary Brian, Alfred Allen
plot: Gold miner Edd Denmeade loves Lucy Watson, the sister of the official mining claim recorder. Denmeade suspects Watson of killing his father, who after a poker game was shot by a gambler "who shuffles with one hand." The real murde...
